TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == pn'asan ryax == utux utux kawas ga, maki pcpung mtenah alang ta, ksli'an ta kwara ryax haca. lpyung ta ro kwara gluw ta, ana kahul theya' sali' naha ga, p'asun naha mwah tisal sali' ta, lama skbalay nni'un kwara utux utux sali', nyan mnaga uwah naha.
S.PHON: == pn Ēas~…ēan rjax == utux utux kawas~…ē …£a, maki p ¶~ ®puŇč mtenańß alaŇč ta, ks~…ēli Ēan ta kwara rjax ńßa ¶~ ®a. lpjuŇč ta ro kwara …£luw ta, ana kańßul tńßeja Ē s~…ēali Ē nańßa …£a, p Ēas~…ēun nańßa mwańß tis~…ēal s~…ēali Ē ta, lama s~…ēkő≤alaj nni Ēun kwara utux utux s~…ēali Ē, njan mna…£a uwańß nańßa.
S.FORM: == pn'asan ryax == utux utux kawas ga, maki pcpung mtenah alang ta, ksli'an ta kwara ryax haca. lpyung ta ro kwara gluw ta, ana kahul theya' sali' naha ga, p'asun naha mwah tisal sali' ta, lama skbalay nni'un kwara utux utux sali', nyan mnaga uwah naha.
S.PHON: == pn Ēas~…ēan rjax == utux utux kawas~…ē …£a, maki p ¶~ ®puŇč mtenańß alaŇč ta, ks~…ēli Ēan ta kwara rjax ńßa ¶~ ®a. lpjuŇč ta ro kwara …£luw ta, ana kańßul tńßeja Ē s~…ēali Ē nańßa …£a, p Ēas~…ēun nańßa mwańß tis~…ēal s~…ēali Ē ta, lama s~…ēkő≤alaj nni Ēun kwara utux utux s~…ēali Ē, njan mna…£a uwańß nańßa.
